payload.answer: No durable memory will be committed from this context-only fixture.

entity_resolution.reason: The provided table is labeled as context from a fixture and does not request to persist any facts as durable memory.

payload.intent: Compile and decide what to store as durable memory from the provided context table.

details: Input treated as non-persistent fixture context.
No durable memory cards emitted to avoid committing ambiguous/superseded fixture facts.

repair_options: If you want these PPO run metrics stored as durable memory, explicitly request persistence of the rows and specify the desired granularity (e.g., per-run metrics, baseline vs tuned).
